title: Mobs Drop Meat
description: A mod that makes mobs drop meat when they die
body:
Make every kill count!

Lots of Minecraft mobs don't drop meat. This mod fixes that by adding a new meat item that many mobs will now start dropping.

Finally a use for those mobs that drop nothing.

Gone are the days when you see only mobs that drop nothing when you are hungry.



**Features:**
Meat

Cooked meat

Hunting new mobs for meat
